name: The Admiral
description: A reality-bending, ultimate spectral admiral. Summoning the ghost ship of Claddish to crush his enemies beneath the waves of eternity.
imagePrompt: Yu-Gi-Oh! card game art style. Admiral Kunkka from Dota 2. A rugged spectral captain with a glowing green cutlass. Behind him, a colossal, ghostly wooden galleon rises from a whirlpool of emerald water. Dynamic sword-swinging pose. Background: stormy high-seas battle. Saturated greens and blues, sharp stylized linework, cinematic volumetric lighting. 8k resolution, epic scale, transcendent energy. No text, no signature.

name: Slark The Mutain
description: A reality-bending, ultimate abyssal assassin. Emerging from the darkest depths of Dark Reef, cloaked in a shadow dance that defies perception.
imagePrompt: Yu-Gi-Oh! card game art style. Slark, the Nightcrawler from Dota 2. A lean, agile amphibious fish-like assassin with sharp claws and a serrated dagger. Shrouded in dark, swirling abyssal shadows. Glowing purple eyes, fins on back. Dynamic crouching pose. Background: dark bioluminescent underwater prison. High contrast, sharp linework, vibrant purple and teal energy. 8k, hyper-detailed, masterpiece. No text, no signature.

name: Spirit the Breaker
description: A reality-bending, ultimate celestial bull. Charging across worlds at impossible speeds, shattering the boundaries of space and time.
imagePrompt: Yu-Gi-Oh! card game art style. Spirit Breaker (Barathum) from Dota 2. A massive, anthropomorphic blue celestial bull with glowing white eyes and a heavy iron flail. Charging forward with blue ethereal trails and lightning behind him. Epic dynamic pose. Background: a bridge between dimensions. High contrast, intense blue and gold colors, sharp linework. 8k, hyper-detailed, powerful aura. No text, no signature.

name: The Mercurial
description: A reality-bending, ultimate spectral entity. Shimmering between dimensions, her presence heralds an inevitable and silent doom.
imagePrompt: Yu-Gi-Oh! card game art style. Spectre from Dota 2. An ethereal phantom composed of shimmering purple and black spectral energy. Jagged, curved blade merging with her arm. Surrounded by blurred afterimages. Cosmic void background with star-like sparks. Dynamic floating pose. Saturated neon purples, sharp stylized edges, transcendent energy. 8k resolution, cinematic lighting. No text, no signature.

name: King of the Kaiju
description: A reality-bending, ultimate prehistoric predator. His atomic breath can melt reality itself, a true god of destruction among the stars.
imagePrompt: Yu-Gi-Oh! card game art style. Godzilla, King of the Monsters. A colossal reptilian kaiju with jagged dorsal plates glowing with intense neon blue atomic energy. Firing a beam of blue atomic breath into the sky. Dynamic low-angle shot. Background: destroyed futuristic city in flames. High contrast, saturated oranges and blues, sharp linework. 8k, hyper-detailed, masterpiece, cosmic reality-bending visuals. No text, no signature.

name: The Sun-Born
description: A reality-bending, ultimate solar phoenix. Its wings are made of living plasma, bringing the heat of a dying star to the battlefield.
imagePrompt: Yu-Gi-Oh! card game art style. A colossal avian kaiju composed of burning orange plasma and golden feathers. Massive wingspan trailing solar flares. Glowing white eyes. Dynamic flying pose over a scorched landscape. High contrast, saturated oranges and yellows. Sharp stylized linework. 8k, hyper-detailed, cosmic reality-bending visuals. No text, no signature.

name: The Void Monarch
description: A reality-bending, ultimate three-headed hydra-dragon. Each head commands a different cosmic force, tearing through the fabric of the multiverse.
imagePrompt: Yu-Gi-Oh! card game art style. A colossal three-headed golden dragon kaiju with massive tattered wings. One head breathes purple energy, another blue electricity, the third black fire.
